::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">9</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576725006259" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Benchmarking a modern laboratory-based powder diffraction instrument for in situ studies in transmission geometry</span>

S. M. Vornholt, J. J. Ferrari, B. A. Sanchez Monserrate, B. G. Mullens, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, M. L. Beauvais, P. J. Chupas, and K. W. Chapman

*J. Appl. Crystallogr.* **2025**, *58*, 5. DOI: 10.1107/S1600576725006259
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](09_2025_labdiff/2025labdif_TOC.jpg)
:::

:::
